home.heroTitle: Designing an attractive way to create complete certificates online.
home.heroSub: Generate professional certificates, documents and credentials with a single click — design once, then issue one or thousands automatically.
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need to issue certificates
home.f1Body: Fonts, images, shapes, QR, signatures and tables on a powerful canvas.
home.f2Post: placeholders and merge data for bulk generation.
home.f3Body: Upload a spreadsheet, validate, generate, and route through approval workflows.
home.f4Body: Tamper-proof exports and instant public verification of every credential.
home.pricingLead: Features unlock by plan — the app gates each capability automatically.
home.aboutLead: Certifada is a team building the simplest way for organizations to design, issue and verify certificates at scale — securely and on-brand.
home.contactLead: Questions or a custom plan? We'd love to hear from you.

landing.footTag: The certificate lifecycle platform. Design, issue, deliver and verify digital credentials your recipients can trust — at any scale.
landing.heroSub: Design, issue, deliver and verify digital certificates at any scale — from one intelligent workspace built for governments, universities, Schools, training centres and enterprises.
landing.segTitle: Trusted across every sector that certifies
landing.featSub: One workspace for the entire credential lifecycle — no stitching tools together, no manual steps, no doubt about authenticity.
landing.f1B: A drag-and-drop canvas with dynamic variables — recipient names, courses, dates, QR codes, seals, signatures and grades — pixel-perfect on every export.
landing.f2B: Import a spreadsheet or call the API. Validate, generate and issue thousands of certificates in a single run.
landing.f3B: Certificates arrive by email, SMS or WhatsApp — each recipient gets a secure personal portal to view, download and share.
landing.f4B: Every credential carries a tamper-proof ID and QR code. Anyone can verify authenticity in seconds — no account needed.
landing.f5B: Route drafts through reviewers and signatories with full role-based control before anything is issued.
landing.f6B: Track issuance, opens and verifications in real time. Every action is logged, and the full platform is scriptable through a clean REST API.
landing.howTitle: From template to trusted credential in
landing.how1B: Craft a branded template with dynamic fields in the visual designer.
landing.how2B: Generate one or thousands — via Excel import, the app, or the API.
landing.how3B: Send through email, SMS or WhatsApp with a secure recipient portal.
landing.how4B: Anyone confirms authenticity instantly by QR or certificate ID.
landing.secSub: Certifada is multi-tenant by design, with the governance layer institutions expect from day one.
landing.sec1: Complete, immutable audit logs for every action
landing.sec2: One-click revocation with public status updates
landing.sec3: Fine-grained roles, permissions and approval chains
landing.sec4: Multi-tenant isolation with custom domains & branding
landing.promiseSub: No inflated numbers. No locked-in contracts. Just a platform designed to work harder for you than any tool you've used before.
landing.p1Title: Up and running in under 10 minutes
landing.p1Body: Create your first template, issue your first credential, and share a live verification link — all before your coffee gets cold.
landing.p2Body: Every organisation gets direct onboarding support. If setup takes more than a day, we fix it ourselves — no ticket queues.
landing.p3Body: No vendor lock-in. Export everything at any time in open formats. Your certificates, your templates, your records — fully portable.
landing.prSub: Start free, upgrade when you grow. Every capability is gated by plan — automatically.
landing.plan1Sub: For trying the platform end to end.
landing.q1: How do recipients verify a certificate?
landing.a1: Every certificate carries a unique ID and QR code linking to a public verification page. Anyone can confirm authenticity in seconds — no login or app required.
landing.q2: Can we issue certificates in bulk?
landing.a2: Yes. Upload an Excel sheet or call the REST API, map your columns to template variables, validate, and issue thousands in a single run — with automatic delivery.
landing.q3: Does Certifada support our branding and domain?
landing.a3: Fully. Templates, emails, portals and verification pages carry your logos, colours and — on higher plans — your own custom domain.
landing.q4: What happens if a credential must be revoked?
landing.a4: Revoke in one click. The public verification page updates immediately to show the revoked status, and the action is captured in the audit log.
landing.ctaSub: Free to start. No credit card required. Your first certificate can be live in minutes.
landing.ctaPhone: Prefer a call? Reach us at —
landing.certPresented: This certificate is proudly presented to
landing.tk2: Bulk issuance via CSV or API
landing.tk6: Full audit trail on every action

wf.title: The credential journey,
wf.sub: Watch a certificate move through every stage — who does what, what each step can do, and the properties it carries.

s1.title: Design the template
s1.desc: Compose a branded, reusable template on a visual canvas and bind dynamic variables that fill themselves at issue time.
s1.f2: Insert dynamic variables and QR placeholders
s1.f3: Add seals, digital signatures and grades
s1.f4: Save as a reusable, versioned template

s2.title: Issue one — or thousands
s2.desc: Feed data from a spreadsheet or the API. Certifada validates every row and generates each certificate from the template.
s2.f1: Excel / CSV import with column mapping

s3.title: Approve & sign
s3.desc: Route drafts through reviewers and authorized signatories. Nothing is released until the chain of approvals is complete.
s3.f3: Every action written to the audit log

s4.title: Deliver everywhere
s4.desc: Approved certificates are delivered automatically across channels, and every recipient gets a secure personal portal.

s5.title: Verify & manage
s5.desc: Anyone can confirm authenticity in seconds by QR or ID — while you keep full control to revoke, re-issue and analyse.
s5.f1: Instant public verification by QR / ID

landing.capsSub: The essentials are front and centre — and everything a serious credentialing operation needs is here too.
landing.capsMore: And everything else you would expect

pricingPage.title: Plans that scale
pricingPage.sub: Design stunning certificates, automate delivery, and manage your credentials platform — all in one place.
pricingPage.cfmUpgradeMsg: You'll pay {{price}} now through secure Stripe checkout. {{plan}} starts the moment the payment completes, and any unused time from your current plan is credited to your account automatically.
pricingPage.cfmDowngradeMsg: You'll keep {{current}} until {{date}} — you already paid for it. From then on you'll be on {{plan}} at {{price}}. Nothing is charged now.
pricingPage.cfmFreeMsg: Your {{current}} subscription ends on {{date}}, then your account moves to Free automatically. Your data is kept — you just won't be able to create beyond the Free limits.
pricingPage.cfmKeepMsg: This cancels the scheduled change — you'll simply stay on {{plan}} with no interruption.
